data.title: Nuclear industry surges as Meta signs agreements for 6 gigawatts of nuclear energy, driving sector's growth.
data.description: On Friday, Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META) made a significant move into the nuclear energy sector, causing a surge in the OKLO stock price. The company's entrance into this field was marked by the announcement of agreements totaling over 6 gigawatts of capacity. This development highlights the increasing demand for carbon-free power from Big Tech companies, driving the growth of the nuclear industry. The momentum began with a notable 20-year deal between Meta and Vistra Corp. (NYSE: VST), where Meta will acquire 2.6 gigawatts of energy from Vistra's nuclear assets in Ohio and Pennsylvania. The partnership with Meta signifies a potentially impactful shift in the renewable energy landscape, as detailed in a broader report on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dow Jones up by 0.2%, gained to 49,342.43; U.S. economy added 50,000 jobs in Dec, easing concerns about job losses.
data.description: U.S. stocks saw gains in early trading, with the Dow Jones up 0.2%, sitting at 49,342.43 and the NASDAQ and S&P 500 both rising by 0.29% to 23,547.90 and 6,941.76, respectively on Friday. Utilities sector gained 2%, while consumer discretionary stocks dipped by 0.6%. The U.S. economy closed 2025 with a steadier labor market, added 50,000 nonfarm payrolls in December. Rich Sparkle Holdings Ltd (NASDAQ: ANPA) shares surged by 112% to $51.41. Check out Benzinga for more.

data.title: BTC price hovers around $90K with traders cautious before US Supreme Court decision on trade tariffs.
data.description: Traders in the Bitcoin market refrained from making significant moves due to the stagnant price of BTC. The market stood still as investors anticipated a crucial ruling on US trade tariffs from the Supreme Court. The decision was eagerly awaited, with uncertainty lingering in the air. The price of Bitcoin remained steady, with trading activity subdued. Investors held back, choosing not to take any risks until further clarity was provided. The market's attention was diverted towards the impending decision, as traders closely monitored the situation. Overall, the atmosphere was cautious as participants awaited the outcome of the Supreme Court's decision on US trade tariffs.

data.title: Patriot Principles Project launches with Trump corruption billboards in swing districts, aiming to promote policies for all Americans.
data.description: This week marked the official launch of the Patriot Principles Project in Allentown, Pennsylvania, Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, and Eau Claire, Wisconsin. The initiative focuses on safeguarding collective principles and promoting policies that prioritize the concerns of all citizens. The Project, established on January 9, 2026, aims to advocate for policies that benefit all Americans.
